title: Show-off Fermented Juicy Rice Krispies Crumble
description: A unique and show-stopping fermented rice krispie treat featuring a juicy texture and Ethiopian-inspired flavors, suitable for kosher households.

ingredients.name: Fermented Syrup (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a homemade fermented syrup, mix 1 cup water with 2 tablespoons sugar and let it ferment for at least 24 hours. Strain out solids.

ingredients.name: Almond Milk
ingredients.notes: Optional, for extra moisture and a lighter texture.

instructions: Prepare the fermented syrup if using by mixing water, sugar, and apple cider vinegar in a pot.
Boil the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches a boil. Add cornstarch and stir continuously to prevent burning.
Once cooked to desired consistency, remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Add salt and almond milk (if using) to the cooled syrup and mix well.
Fold the Rice Krispies into the sweetened mixture by gently tossing them until fully incorporated.
Transfer the crumble onto a greased baking sheet or tray and place in refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving to allow it to set.
